---
title: "ESB-vaktin & Þingfréttir"
subtitle: "Databeers #15"
author:
  - name: Brynjólfur Gauti Guðrúnar Jónsson
date: 2026-05-27
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: theme.scss
    simplemenu:
      flat: false
      barhtml:
        header: "<div class='menubar mb-10'><ul class='menu'></ul></div>"
        footer: "<div class='footer footer-default' style='display: block;'> <a href='https://metill.is/databeers15' target='_blank'>metill.is/databeers15</a></div>"
html-math-method: plain
revealjs-plugins:
  - simplemenu
---

## {data-name="Intro" .no-heading}

::: {.landscape-grid}

::: {.landscape-project}

[ESB-vaktin]{.project-name}

[*EU referendum, fact-checked*]{.project-tagline}

:::

::: {.landscape-project}

[Þingfréttir]{.project-name}

[*Alþingi pundit, in English*]{.project-tagline}

:::

::: {.landscape-project}

[Metill.is]{.project-name}

[*Public-interest data platform*]{.project-tagline}

:::

::: {.landscape-project}

[Sirkabát]{.project-name}

[*Podcast with Georg Gylfason*]{.project-tagline}

:::

:::

## {data-name="Þingfréttir" .no-heading}

![](Figures/thingfrettir-landing.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="72%"}

## {.no-heading}

![](Figures/thingfrettir-article.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="58%"}

## {.no-heading}

::: columns
::: {.column width="70%"}
![](Figures/thingfrettir-charts.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="100%"}
:::
::: {.column width="30%"}

::: {.chart-callout .fragment}
[Icelandic review]{.label}

[Miðeind]{.name}
:::

:::
:::

## {.no-heading}

::: {.image-stack}
![](Figures/thingfrettir_viz1.png){.stack-image .fragment}
![](Figures/thingfrettir_viz2.png){.stack-image .fragment}
![](Figures/thingfrettir_viz3.png){.stack-image .fragment}
![](Figures/thingfrettir_viz4.png){.stack-image .fragment}
![](Figures/thingfrettir_viz5.png){.stack-image .fragment}
![](Figures/thingfrettir_viz6.png){.stack-image .fragment}
:::

## {data-name="ESB-vaktin" .no-heading}

![](Figures/esbvaktin-landing.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="72%"}

## {.no-heading}

<div class="pipeline">

<div class="pipeline-step fragment">
  <span class="pipeline-icon">1</span>
  <span class="pipeline-label">Discussion</span>
  <span class="pipeline-desc">Articles, speeches, and interviews scanned</span>
  <span class="pipeline-count">503 articles</span>
</div>

<span class="pipeline-arrow">→</span>

<div class="pipeline-step fragment">
  <span class="pipeline-icon">2</span>
  <span class="pipeline-label">Claims</span>
  <span class="pipeline-desc">Measurable assertions extracted</span>
  <span class="pipeline-count">2,673 logged</span>
</div>

<span class="pipeline-arrow">→</span>

<div class="pipeline-step fragment">
  <span class="pipeline-icon">3</span>
  <span class="pipeline-label">Sources</span>
  <span class="pipeline-desc">Cross-referenced with data and legal codes</span>
  <span class="pipeline-count">516 sources</span>
</div>

<span class="pipeline-arrow">→</span>

<div class="pipeline-step fragment">
  <span class="pipeline-icon">4</span>
  <span class="pipeline-label">Verdict</span>
  <span class="pipeline-desc">Claims classified by quality</span>
  <span class="pipeline-verdicts"><span style="color:#2e6a4f">●</span> <span style="color:#8a6a1e">●</span> <span style="color:#6b6358">●</span> <span style="color:#a63a2b">●</span> <span style="color:#8b3d5e">●</span></span>
</div>

</div>

<div class="pipeline-example fragment"><span class="ex-cell"><span class="ex-label">Article</span><span class="ex-content"><em>"The proportion is likely closer to 20% today, but a long way from 75–80%."</em><span class="ex-source">Stjórnmálin · 24 March</span></span></span><span class="ex-arrow">→</span><span class="ex-cell"><span class="ex-label">Claim</span><span class="ex-content">"Iceland has adopted 80% of EU regulation"</span></span><span class="ex-arrow">→</span><span class="ex-cell"><span class="ex-label">Evidence</span><span class="ex-content"><span class="ev-id">EEA-LEGAL-001</span> · <span class="ev-id">EEA-DATA-017</span> · <span class="ev-id">EEA-LEGAL-006</span></span></span><span class="ex-arrow">→</span><span class="ex-verdict ex-verdict--partial">Partially confirmed</span></div>

## {.no-heading}

![](Figures/verdicts.png){fig-align="center" width="86%"}

## {.no-heading}

![](Figures/topics.png){fig-align="center" width="86%"}

## {.no-heading .reframe-slide}

::: {.reframe}

An LLM is a tool.

::: {.fragment}
Verify the methods.
:::

::: {.fragment}
Fail loudly.
:::

:::

## {.no-heading}

::: {.three-tips}

:::: {.tip-row .fragment}
![](Figures/timhaford.webp){.tip-portrait}

::: {.tip-body}
[*"Does this make me feel emotional?"*]{.tip}

[— Tim Harford]{.attribution}
:::
::::

:::: {.tip-row .fragment}
![](Figures/davidspiegelhalter.jpg){.tip-portrait}

::: {.tip-body}
[*"Is someone trying to inform me, or to persuade me?"*]{.tip}

[— David Spiegelhalter]{.attribution}
:::
::::

:::: {.tip-row .fragment}
![](Figures/onoraoneill.jpg){.tip-portrait}

::: {.tip-body}
[*"Don't try to increase trust — demonstrate trustworthiness."*]{.tip}

[— Onora O'Neill]{.attribution}
:::
::::

:::

## Thank you {.thank-you}

- [metill.is](https://metill.is)
- [esbvaktin.is](https://esbvaktin.is)
- [thingfrettir.is](https://thingfrettir.is)
- *Sirkabát* podcast (with Georg Gylfason)
